input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule IC.1.1.1 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: ic.1.1.1
            TITLE: the engine(s) used to power the vehicle must:

            CONTENT:
            rule IC.1.1.1: The engine(s) used to power the vehicle must:
IC.1.1.1 The engine(s) used to power the vehicle must: 
a. Be a piston engine(s) using a four stroke primary heat cycle  
b. Have a total combined displacement less than or equal to 710 cc per cycle.

final_answer: The engine(s) used to power the vehicle must: IC.1.1.1 The engine(s) used to power the vehicle must: a. Be a piston engine(s) using a four stroke primary heat cycle b. Have a total combined displacement less than or equal to 710 cc per cycle.
